messages.content: School starts at 9:15AM and pack up is at 3:15PM. There is a 1 hour break for lunch and recess at 12:30PM. There needs to be an hour for math, 45 minutes for Language Arts, and 30 minutes for Science. There needs to be a 2.5 hour testing session right after a 15-minute bathroom break. Can you give me a possible timeline of the school day? ONLY USE SUBJECTS FROM THE QUESTION, PUT THINGS IN ANY ORDER, AND MAKE SURE NOTHING IS AFTER 3:15PM.

9:15AM - School starts
9:15AM-10:15AM - Math 
10:15AM-11:00AM - Language Arts
11:00AM-11:30AM - Science
11:30AM-12:30PM - Free time
12:30PM-1:30PM - Lunch and recess
1:30PM-2:00PM - Language Arts
2:00PM-2:30PM - Science
2:30PM-3:00PM - Math
3:00PM-3:15PM - Pack up
3:15PM-3:30PM - Bathroom break
3:30PM-6:00PM - Testing session
NOTHING SHOULD BE AFTER 3:15PM, \
